Why is this completely free?

We're official Shopify Partners. When you start your store through us, Shopify pays us a commission — so we never need to charge you a single dollar.

How It Works

From zero to selling in 4 simple steps

1

We Set Up Your Store

Your eCommerce site is built with 30 high-potential products in your niche — completely free.

2

Suppliers Handle Fulfillment

Integrated suppliers ship products directly to your customers, handling all logistics for you.

3

Keep the Difference

You pocket the margin on every sale. Sell for $39.99, pay the supplier $9.99 — keep the $30 difference.

Your profit $30.00
Supplier $9.99
4

Scale and Grow

Reinvest your profits, optimize your store, and expand to build a thriving online business.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about getting your free online store.

Yes, 100%. We are official Shopify Partners, which means Shopify compensates us when we refer new merchants to their platform. This allows us to build your store at no cost to you. There are no hidden fees, no surprise charges, and no credit card required to get started.
When you sign up for Shopify through our partner link, Shopify pays us a referral commission. This is a standard partnership program that Shopify offers to certified agencies and partners. You pay the same Shopify subscription price as everyone else — we simply earn a commission from Shopify for connecting you with their platform.
Not at all. We build your entire store for you — design, products, copy, and supplier connections. We also include training materials so you can learn at your own pace. Many of our most successful store owners started with zero ecommerce experience.
On average, your store is ready in just 10 minutes. Once you complete the setup steps, our system builds and configures your store automatically. You'll be ready to review and launch in no time.
We build every store on Shopify — the world's leading ecommerce platform. Shopify powers millions of businesses worldwide, from small startups to enterprise brands. It's trusted, secure, and designed to scale with your business.
Shopify offers a free trial so you can explore your store before committing. After the trial, Shopify's plans start at a very affordable monthly rate. This subscription goes directly to Shopify (not to us) and gives you access to their full platform, payment processing, and support.
No. Your store is set up with a dropshipping model, which means you don't buy or store any products yourself. When a customer orders from your store, the supplier ships the product directly to them. You only pay for the product after you've already been paid by your customer.
Yes. We set up your store using the dropshipping fulfillment model, which is one of the most popular ways to sell online. You list products in your store, and when someone buys, the supplier handles packaging and shipping. This means no upfront inventory costs and no warehousing required.
Yes. Our team provides ongoing support to help you with any questions, store changes, or issues that come up. We also include training resources to help you understand how to manage and grow your business after launch.
Absolutely. Once your store is delivered, you have full access to your Shopify dashboard. You can change the colors, fonts, layout, products, pricing, and anything else. It's your store — you have complete control over every aspect of it.
We add 30 hand-picked, trending products that are currently performing well in ecommerce. These are products with strong demand, healthy margins, and reliable suppliers. You can swap, remove, or add more products at any time after delivery.
We include training on how to drive traffic to your store using social media, paid advertising, and organic marketing strategies. Many store owners start with platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok to attract their first customers.
None at all. There is no contract, no commitment, and no obligation. If you sign up and decide it's not for you, you can simply walk away. We build your store for free because we believe in the value of what we offer — not because we want to lock you into anything.
